text:
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub notification that personal access token 'jeeves3' will expire in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub notification that personal access token 'jeevesagain' will expire in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that Loop Monitor workflow failed in jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] Mrs. Lang: Daily correspondence summary from lang.mc@gmail.com highlighting 3 loop-monitor alerts as most pressing matter.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow had unsuccessful jobs.
- [escalation] Mrs. Lang: Jeeves pipeline alert from lang.mc@gmail.com about permanent failure of Daily Pipeline due to 429 rate limit error.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed on the main branch.
- [reply needed] Zamzar: Zamzar billing service requesting updated payment details due to failed payment processing.
- [reply needed] Tavily: Stripe notification that Tavily payment of $47.12 failed due to credit card issue.
- [reply needed] Tavily: Tavily notification that pay-as-you-go charge failed, possibly due to expired card or insufficient funds.
